reasoning: My Swasthya Sathi card is in my hand, Didi's card — it paid for my husband's hernia operation when we had nothing. My daughter's Kanyashree money kept her in school. Shantanu promised CAA would fix our papers, and look — we are still waiting, still anxious about documents. Both parties are corrupt, both make promises, but only one has given me something I can hold. My husband votes with his head for religion and citizenship dreams; I vote with my hand for what has already touched it. Tomorrow my husband still needs his daily wages, and the next day I still need my card to work when he cannot work. This is not loyalty — it is arithmetic.
primary_drivers: Swasthya Sathi card and Kanyashree — concrete TMC schemes that have materially helped her family
Skepticism toward BJP's CAA promise — it has not delivered citizenship regularization despite being promised
Pragmatism over ideology — she votes for what works on the ground, not for political names or large promises
